prompt: Build me a context menu for a file manager app — it should have Cut, Copy, Paste items, a separator, then a 'Sort by' submenu with radio options for Name/Date/Size, and a 'Show hidden files' checkbox item. I'm using base-ui.
assertions: portal-positioner-popup: Uses Menu.Portal > Menu.Positioner > Menu.Popup pattern
uses-submenu: Uses Menu.SubmenuRoot + Menu.SubmenuTrigger for Sort By
uses-radio-group: Uses Menu.RadioGroup with Menu.RadioItem for sort options
uses-checkbox-item: Uses Menu.CheckboxItem for Show Hidden Files
